name: Chocolate Scotcheroos
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure the corn syrup and sugar into a large saucepan.
2. Cook over medium heat, stirring frequently, until the sugar dissolves and the mixture begins to boil.
3. Remove from heat; stir in the peanut butter.
4. Mix well. Add the rice krispies and stir until well coated.
5. Press the mixture into a 9-inch x 13-inch x 2-inch pan that has been coated with nonstick vegetable cooking spray.
6. Melt the chocolate and butterscotch chips together in a small saucepan over low heat, stirring constantly.
7. Spread this mixture evenly over the cereal mixture.
8. Let stand until firm. Cut into 1-inch x 2-inch bars to serve.
